name: brainblend-plugins
description: Official plugins for the Atomic Agents framework - a lightweight, modular system for building AI agents with Pydantic and Instructor

plugins.name: atomic-agents
plugins.description: Skills and a reviewer subagent for building, scaffolding, and auditing applications with the Atomic Agents Python framework. Progressive-disclosure references for schemas, agents, tools, context providers, prompts, orchestration, memory, hooks, providers, project structure, and testing — plus an isolated-context reviewer subagent and a new-app scaffolder.
